assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses this with 'Never upgrade GKE beyond what your Istio version supports' and includes checklist item to verify 'Istio 1.30+ support verified' before proceeding

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Includes specific checklist item 'Istio 1.30+ support verified (check Istio release notes)' and mentions checking compatibility requirements

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Clearly states in checklist 'If unsupported: plan Istio upgrade first to compatible version' and Phase 1 provides specific commands for upgrading Istio control plane if needed

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Addresses webhook issues in 'Admission Webhook Failures' section, explaining 'Istio's sidecar injector webhook may reject pods during upgrade' and provides mitigation commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Phase 4 specifically covers data plane upgrade with 'Rolling restart of workloads to pick up new Envoy version' and validation includes checking version alignment with 'istioctl version'

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple monitoring recommendations including 'No proxy version skew: istioctl version' in checklist and 'Version alignment: istioctl version (control plane and data plane match)' in post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides specific commands throughout: 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system', and monitoring commands during upgrade phases

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Addresses this in 'Envoy Proxy Version Compatibility' risk section and mentions version skew expectations during validation steps, plus troubleshooting section for proxy status issues
